issue.title: Track and display agent work by project and ChangeSpec in Statistics
issue.description: The Admin Center Statistics tab shows which projects and ChangeSpecs SASE agents ran on, through a dedicated Projects view with three grouping strategies (by project, by ChangeSpec, and a project-to-ChangeSpec drill-down), new project/changespec runtime group-by dimensions, a Top Projects overview table, and a global project filter; ChangeSpec attribution becomes durable and reliable by propagating commit-time spec names into the indexed run records and normalizing the historical launch-name fallback.

issue.title: Commit-time ChangeSpec attribution
issue.description: 'Commit-time ChangeSpec attribution' section: propagate per-commit ChangeSpec names from commit_results.json into done.step_output.meta_commits[] and agent_meta.json's commit_changespec_name so which-spec-an-agent-committed-to reaches the durable artifact index, with regression tests.

issue.title: Rust core work statistics engine
issue.description: 'Rust core work statistics engine' section: extend sase_core's agent_stats with per-project and per-ChangeSpec rollups (attribution normalization, spec-status join from .sase files, project filter, project/changespec runtime group-by variants), wire types, PyO3 bindings, and Rust tests.

issue.title: Python stats facade work views and filters
issue.description: 'Python stats facade work views and filters' section: extend src/sase/stats/ with the work-stats view models, project/changespec group-by literals, project-filter plumbing, Top Projects overview data, and the sase-core-rs dependency floor bump, with pytest coverage.

issue.title: Projects view in the Statistics tab
issue.description: 'Projects view in the Statistics tab' section: add the Projects sub-view with three g-cycled grouping strategies, project color chips and ChangeSpec status glyphs, the Top Projects overview table, runtime group-by extension, the p project-filter key, keymap config, styles, behavior tests, and PNG visual snapshots.

fields.notes: Implemented Rust work-statistics attribution and rollups in sase-core: project/ChangeSpec request and response wires (schema v2), project filters for run and activity queries, commit-over-launch attribution with placeholder normalization, active/archive status joins, project and ChangeSpec runtime groupings, PyO3 round trips, and regression coverage. Verified with cargo fmt --all -- --check, cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings, and cargo test --workspace.

Implemented commit_results ChangeSpec projection and primary-workspace agent_meta commit_changespec_name persistence with linked/external-repo and no-op rewrite safeguards. Regression coverage passes (45 focused tests); full lint/validation passes, and the sole unrelated parallel TUI timing failure passes serially.

Implemented the Python statistics facade for project and ChangeSpec work data: project/changespec runtime groups, project filters and work_top_n requests, immutable nested work view models, Overview top projects, schema-v2 binding smoke coverage, sase-core-rs 0.8.x floor, and a setup validation probe that rebuilds stale pre-schema-v2 extensions. Verification: 44 in-scope stats/core-validation tests pass; Ruff, mypy, formatting, Symvision, and all non-pytest just-check gates pass. Full just check reached 18,899 passing tests and fails only 8 pre-existing Chop result-file tests reproduced serially outside this bead.

Implemented the Statistics Projects view with By Project, By ChangeSpec, and project-to-ChangeSpec drill-down groupings; deterministic project chips and shared ChangeSpec status glyphs; Top Projects overview; project/ChangeSpec runtime groups; global project filter with stale-result protection and unscoped-table labels; scoped keymap/schema updates; behavior coverage; and six verified PNG Statistics goldens (two new Projects views plus four updated views). Verification: focused Statistics/keymap/schema/ChangeSpec tests 204 passed; real stats binding tests 11 passed; Statistics visual suite 6 passed with exact PNG equality; formatting, Ruff, mypy, Symvision, size, and SASE validation passed. Full parallel suite reached 18,909 passed / 7 skipped; its eight deterministic unrelated failures are the pre-existing chop result-file incompatibility from the required but unpublished sase-core-rs 0.8 binding (origin/master is still version 0.7), and one Statistics soak contention failure passed in isolation.
